pages.title: Computer
pages.text: The personal workstation of the LogiCore network. While it lacks the raw parallel processing power of a $(l:logicore:machines/server_rack)Server Rack$(), the Computer is a reliable entry-level machine for generating $(l:logicore:architecture/cycles)Cycles$().

pages.title: System Requirements
pages.text: To function, the Computer requires $(l:logicore:components/processor_units)Processor Units$() installed in its 9 CPU slots and a connection to a power source via $(l:logicore:components/data_cable)Data Cable$().$(br)$(br)$(l)Compatibility:$() Only $(6)Basic$() and $(a)Advance$() tier CPUs are supported. $(d)Ultimate$() processors are too powerful for the Computer's architecture.$(br)$(br)$(l)Performance:$()$(br)Expect lower cycle generation rates compared to industrial hardware.
A compact chassis capable of housing standard processor units.
